top_signals.title: Foreign Investors Snap Up Turkish Stocks in Fast-Track Trades
top_signals.summary: Foreign investors are piling into fast-tracked sales of shares in Turkish companies, seeing pockets of value in a market facing political turmoil at home and fallout from the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 1.5%, is only gainer
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: White House unveils pared-back AI executive order
top_signals.summary: The order notes that federal access to the models should be subject to “appropriate confidentiality, cybersecurity, insider-risk, and intellectual-property protection, use, and nondisclosure requirements.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Resource nationalism redraws critical minerals playbook
top_signals.summary: Export controls, quotas and state intervention are the main reasons why the old mining game plan no longer works.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
top_signals.summary: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

top_signals.title: Venezuela mining reset meets ground-level challenges
top_signals.summary: Venezuela’s attempt to revive its mining sector after Nicolás Maduro’s ouster is colliding with decades of institutional decay, illegal extraction and investor skepticism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
